title: Nice Mobs Resource Pack
description: Standalone version of the resources for the Nice Mobs data pack.
body: ## 📖 Description This is the stand alone resource pack for the [Nice Mobs](https://modrinth.com/datapack/nice-mobs) data pack. If you don't use this, you can instead use the data pack version as a resource pack too. The resource pack is not required for the auto converted mod version of the data pack.
